opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: [Roommate reports] She screamed that her stomach was tearing apart, grabbed her shoulder, and then just collapsed on the floor.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Sudden collapse with severe pelvic pain, shoulder pain, and profound paleness.

symptom_narrative.onset: sudden severe pain 30 minutes ago followed by collapse
symptom_narrative.character: excruciating, tearing left-sided pelvic pain followed by shoulder pain and collapse
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: not fully able to describe — semi-conscious
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: left pelvis and left shoulder tip
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: [Roommate reports] abnormal dark vaginal bleeding for 3 days, missed her last period, now confused and barely responsive
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: unknown, roommate unsure of full medical or gynaecological history
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: semi-conscious, unable to mobilise, lying on the bathroom floor

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: roommate present, extremely distressed, has already called 000

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: roommate desperately wants to know what to do right now

access_barriers.transport: not applicable — emergency services already required
